title: polygala pyroloides
intro: Polygala pyroloides, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a perennial herb native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Polygala pyroloides include its potential to improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polygala pyroloides are available in the form of capsules, teas, and tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
